name: internet-history-pakistan
description: Interactive timeline and educational resource about Pakistan's internet history

scripts.validate:html: node -e "const V = require('./validate-project.js'); const v = new V(); console.log('Validating HTML files...'); v.findFiles('.', ['.html']).forEach(f => console.log(v.validateHTML(f)));"
scripts.validate:css: node -e "const V = require('./validate-project.js'); const v = new V(); console.log('Validating CSS files...'); v.findFiles('.', ['.css']).forEach(f => console.log(v.validateCSS(f)));"
scripts.validate:json: node -e "const V = require('./validate-project.js'); const v = new V(); console.log('Validating JSON files...'); v.findFiles('.', ['.json']).forEach(f => console.log(v.validateJSON(f)));"

author: Your Name
